TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn_David_Woodard, title = David_Woodard, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Paiwan]}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/wiki/David_Woodard} }

S.FORM: David James Woodard (ciniukukan: Ś§ßŚćę¬∑Ť©ĻŚßÜśĖĮ¬∑šľćŤĺĺŚĺ∑, IPA: /'w äd…Ďňźrd/; 6 a qadaw na 4 a qiljas na 1964 a caviljan ‚Äď na) mavan a kisansemenay i amilika.
S.PHON: david *am…ôs wuudard ( ¶iniukukan: **********, ipa: / Ēw*d**rd/; * a qadaw na * a qi éas na **** a ¶avi éan * na) mavan a kisans…ôm…ônaj i ami…≠ika.
